race.comment: Quite a few of these are having their first start in the NT so watch the market for any major moves. MILK FOAM (11) is one of those, being a former NSW galloper with good form for this. Resumes with the blinkers added and expected to measure up. FABRES (2) has placed at both runs this time in and should be at his top now. Overdue and should run well. PAFITIS (6) was runner-up two back then raced out of class last time and led but was swamped late. Back to maiden class and can do much better. DYNASTY REWARD (1) has placed 2/2 at this course and is capable of giving a tremendous sight. OPULENT OSCAR (5) is a former Victorian having first run here and worth keeping safe.
